headline: Potomac Edison Customers in Maryland Can Lower Their Bills With New Residential Time-of-Use Rate
summary: Maryland customers of Potomac Edison, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE), now have a new way to save on their electric bill. A new residential time-of-use rate lets customers pay less for electricity when they use it during times of the day when demand on the grid is lower.
